name: Shepherd's Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound green beans or 1 pkg. french style
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown onions in butter.
2. Add hamburger and continue browning.
3. Drain excess fat if necessary.
4. Add tomato soup and season with salt, pepper, oregano, and thyme to taste.
5. Transfer the mixture into a greased 2-quart or 2-1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Partially cook green beans separately.
7. Layer the cooked green beans on top of the meat mixture in the casserole dish.
8. Mash potatoes and mix with milk and beaten egg.
9. Spread the mashed potato mixture over the green beans.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until the top is browned and sides are bubbling, approximately 30 minutes.
Yummy!
